zh.Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingd: 英國威爾斯福林爾吉爾凱
zh.Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales: 威爾士安格萊特德拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelicia or Eva verch Richard於大約1098年出生在英國威爾斯安格萊時，她的父親Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi-51歲，母親Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x-55歲。她於1230年與Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd在威爾士安格萊特德拉斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1245年在英國威爾斯享年148歲。

zh-hans.Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingd: 英国威尔斯福林爾吉爾凱
zh-hans.Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales: 威尔士安格萊特德拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelicia or Eva verch Richard于大约1098年出生在英国威尔斯安格萊时，她的父亲Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi-51岁，母亲Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x-55岁。她于1230年与Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd在威尔士安格萊特德拉斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1245年在英国威尔斯享年148岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.
German: variant of   Ferch  .

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Recker
meanings: North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a variant of the personal name   Richard  . This surname is very rare in East Frisia.
North German: topographic name from Middle Low German recke ‘stretch, route, hedge’, or a habitational name for someone from Recke, near Osnabrück.

variants.name: Ricard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Andre, Armand, Normand, Raoul, Adelard, Adrien, Amedee, Damien, Fernand, Francois, Germaine.
French: variant of   Richard  . Compare   Recor  ,   Record  ,   Recore  , and   Ricord  .
Channel Islands (Guernsey): variant of Rickard , the characteristic Norman pronunciation of Richard.

variants.name: Ricardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Roberto, Carlos, Angel, Jorge, Ramon, Ediberto, Guillermo, Joaquin, Juana.
Potuguese and Spanish: from the personal name Ricardo, an equivalent of Richard .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rick
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Rick, a pet form of Richard . Compare Rich 2.
German: from a short form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with rīc ‘power(ful)’.
North German: topographic name from Middle Low German ri(c)k ‘enclosed land, fence’, or from reke ‘row, strip of trees’.

variants.name: Riccardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Salvatore, Angelo, Vito, Antonio, Carmine, Domenico, Francesca.
Italian: from the personal name Riccardo, an equivalent of Richard .

variants.name: Pritchard
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Rhisiart ‘son of Richard’(see Richard ).

variants.name: Reick
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmuth.
German:
from a medieval personal name, a short form of   Richard  , or less commonly of some other compound name with this first element.

variants.name: Reichard
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name (see   Richard  ). This surname (and its variants) has also been adopted by Jews.

variants.name: Reisert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Mathias.
German: variant of Reissert, a variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Ricohard (see Richard ).

variants.name: Reitz
meanings: German: habitational name from a place near Stolpe in Pomerania called Reitz.
German: from a late medieval pet form of the personal name Richard or Heinrich (see Henry ).
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Raytse, of ancient Germanic origin.

nameMeanings.name: Adelicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Delysia
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Adelicia or Eva verch Richard was born about 1098, in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi, was -51 and her mother, Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, was -55. She married Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd in 1230, in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1245, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 148.

fr.Cilcain, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingd: Cilcain, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelicia or Eva verch Richard est née environ 1098, à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi, avait -51 ans et sa mère, Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, avait -55 ans. Elle a épousé Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd en 1230, à Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1245, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 148 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelicia or Eva verch Richard um 1098 in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi -51 und ihre Mutter Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x -55. Sie hat 1230 in Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Wales Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1245 im Alter von 148 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelicia or Eva verch Richard è nata il circa 1098 nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi, aveva -51 anni e sua madre, Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, aveva -55 anni. Lei sposato Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd nel 1230, nel Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1245, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 148 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelicia or Eva verch Richardが約1098年にイギリスウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigiは-51歳，母Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" xは-55歳であった。1230年にウェールズアングレセイトレフドラエスでIthel Fychan ap Ithel Llwdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1245年にイギリスウェールズで148歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelicia or Eva verch Richard(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi(은)는 -51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x(은)는 -55세였다. 그녀는 1230년 웨일스 앤글레시 트레프드라이스에서 Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 영국 웨일스에서 148세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelicia or Eva verch Richard nasceu aproximadamente 1098, em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi, tinha -51 anos e sua mãe, Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, tinha -55 anos. Ela casou-se com Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd em 1230, em Trefdraeth, Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1245, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 148 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelicia or Eva verch Richard родилась около 1098 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi было -51 год, а матери, которую звали Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, -55. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd в 1230 г. в местности трефдрэет, англеси, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1245 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 148 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelicia or Eva verch Richard nació aproximadamente 1098, en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Ap Cadawallader Lord Of Ceredigi, tenía -51 años y su mamá, Annes ferch Gwyn "Ddistain" x, tenía -55 años. Se casó con Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Llwd en 1230, en Trefdraeth, Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1245, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 148 años.
